name: threejs-gamedev-mega-skills
description: Expert procedural geometry, materials, shaders, atmosphere, effects, and final-image skills for Three.js.

interface.longDescription: A modular expertise pack for procedural geometry, coherent materials, advanced shaders, atmosphere, volumetrics, shadows, temporal effects, and deliberate final-image pipelines in Three.js.
defaultPrompt: Decompose an ambitious Three.js visual into expert systems.
Build a coherent procedural material and geometry pipeline.
Audit this scene's graphics mechanisms and visual evidence.
